comment: Single-dose PK parameters inherited from comp-033 Monte Carlo (n=20,000, seed 33). comp-036 builds repeat-dose accumulation kinetics + receptor-occupancy model on top of these single-dose priors WITHOUT re-deriving them. The 'translation efficiency mass ratio' parameter remains the dominant sensitivity driver (Spearman rho = +0.78 in comp-033). The brief for comp-036 instructs explicit inheritance of comp-033's uncertainty distributions and multi-dose math on top.

dose_range_mg_mrna_per_administration.anchor: Translate Bio MRT5005 (8-24 mg) + Arcturus ARCT-032 (4-20 mg)

translation_efficiency_ng_protein_per_ug.anchor: Pardi 2018 Nat Rev Drug Discov; Ogata 2022 CID; comp-033 corrected mass-ratio prior

systemic_bioavailability_from_alveolar_f.anchor: Patton & Byron 2007; 17 kDa non-glycosylated; Afrezza precedent

expression_duration_hours.comment: Modified-nucleoside transient expression window; relevant for first-dose decay-into-trough kinetics

inherited_single_dose_outputs.comment: These are the comp-033 distribution outputs. comp-036 reproduces them as a sanity check on dose=1 (single administration) and then layers repeat-dose accumulation math on top.

model_simplifications_inherited_from_com: Single-compartment PK; zero-order input during expression window; first-order elimination
Lung-expressed protein reaches plasma at the systemic-bioavailability fraction (alveolar interstitium kinetics not separately modeled)
Translation-efficiency parameter folds in all losses upstream of protein synthesis (LNP uncoating, endosomal escape, ribosome engagement, template degradation)
No saturation of cellular translation machinery at the 4-24 mg dose range
v1_extensions_specific_to_comp_036: Superposition principle for multi-dose: total plasma profile is sum of single-dose profiles offset by dosing interval. Holds when expression machinery is not saturated (true at 4-24 mg per dose).

Cumulative dose pharmacology assumed linear over the 1-14 day window — no LNP-induced tolerance, no anti-PEG buildup-driven clearance shift over this short window (the 'repeated dosing' literature for anti-PEG concerns weeks-to-months of exposure, not 3-14 day acute therapy).

Receptor-occupancy is computed using competitive antagonism math at instantaneous plasma IL-1Ra concentration. Receptor turnover (internalization + resynthesis) on the hour timescale is not separately modeled; for IL-1R1 on circulating cells this is reasonable per Sims & Smith 2010 reviews.
